_doc: Prototype-mode tree. Extends legacy tree.json. HP and wood drop derived from balance.json economy.tree.* — HP 40 = K_chop × sword damage (4 swings to fell), drop = W_per_tree (5 wood per tree). Finite resource: respawnTime -1 disables the HarvestNodeSystem respawn queue, so once felled the tree is gone for the run. HarvestNodeSystem spawns a tree-stump prop at the same position on tree death.
